TV Series.title: St. Denis Medical
TV Series.overview: An eclectic group of underfunded yet dedicated doctors and nurses navigates caring for patients while keeping it all together at an Oregon hospital.

TV Series.title: Happy's Place
TV Series.overview: After inheriting her late father’s tavern, Bobbie is shocked to learn that she has a new co-owner -- Isabella, the half-sister she never knew existed.

TV Series.title: Harry & Meghan
TV Series.overview: From their courtship to their exit from royal life, Harry and Meghan share their complex journey in their own words in this documentary series.

TV Series.title: Destination Wild: India
TV Series.overview: Action from Visakhapatnam as India look to make it four wins out of four while the Black Caps look to regain some form ahead of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup.

TV Series.title: Total Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race
Alone
TV Series.overview: Could you endure the ultimate test of survival... completely alone... to win £100k?

TV Series.title: Dating Around: Brazil
TV Series.overview: In this reality show, six singles meet five different blind dates at trendy urban hot spots in Brazil. Who will they choose for a second outing?

TV Series.title: An American Murder Mystery: The Staircase
TV Series.overview: Accident or murder? After the mysterious death of his wife, author Michael Peterson watches his life go under the microscope.

TV Series.title: The Forsyte Saga
TV Series.overview: “The Forsyte Saga" is an epic drama spanning three generations of the powerful Forsyte family at the turn of the 20th century. Beneath the family's imposing veneer lies a festering core of unhappy and brutal relationships.

TV Series.title: Digman!
TV Series.overview: Celebrity archaeologist Rip Digman and his team of experts traveld angerous parts of the world to unearth legendary artifacts and grow their reputations as fearless adventurers.

TV Series.title: MeatEater
TV Series.overview: Outdoorsman, writer, and conservationist Steven Rinella ventures into the wild to hunt animals and uses the meat to make a hearty meal.

TV Series.title: The Fairly OddParents
TV Series.overview: Timmy Turner is an average kid - sort of. He's an only child with oblivious parents. But luckily he has Cosmo and Wanda, his wacky fairy godparents who help him hide from evil babysitters, do homework and much more craziness!

TV Series.title: Mike & Molly
TV Series.overview: Mike and Molly meet one day when Mike speaks at an Overeaters Anonymous meeting and they fall in love, thanks in part to their mutual love of pie and the desire to resist it; both face challenges together in their quest to lose weight.

TV Series.title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen
Hoarders
TV Series.overview: This series delves into the mental disorder of hoarding, as experts work to help individuals overcome obsessive collecting and reclaim their lives.

Movies.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
Movies.overview: Bohemian Rhapsody is an enthralling celebration of Queen, their music, and their extraordinary lead singer Freddie Mercury, who defied stereotypes and convention to become one of history’s most beloved entertainers. Following Queen’s meteoric rise, their revolutionary sound and Freddie’s solo career, the film also chronicles the band’s reunion, and one of the greatest performances in rock history.

Movies.title: Madagascar
Movies.overview: Having spent their entire lives in blissful captivity, four pampered animals from New York's Central Park zoo are in for a shock when they are unexpectedly shipped to Africa and are shipwrecked on the exotic island of Madagascar!

Movies.title: I Feel Pretty
Movies.overview: A woman (Amy Schumer) struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet. Her new confidence empowers her to live fearlessly, but what happens when she realizes her appearance never changed?

Movies.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
Movies.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape. In the world of The Bone Temple, the infected are no longer the greatest threat to survival - the inhumanity of the survivors can be stranger and more terrifying.

Movies.title: Camp X-Ray
Movies.overview: A young Guantanamo prison guard forms an unlikely relationship with a longtime inmate in this riveting psychological drama.

Movies.title: Aziz Ansari: Live at Madison Square Garden
Movies.overview: Stand-up comedian and TV star Aziz Ansari ("Parks and Recreation") delivers his sharp-witted take on immigrants, relationships and the food industry.

Movies.title: The Swan Princess
Movies.overview: Join Prince Derek, Princess Odette and their friends Puffin, Speed and Jean-Bob in the sequel to the Swan Princess.

Movies.title: Field of Dreams
Movies.overview: An Iowa farmer Ray Kinsella is inspired by a voice he can't ignore to pursue a dream he can hardly believe. Supported by his wife, Ray begins the quest by turning his ordinary cornfield into a place where dreams can come true. A heartwarming experience that has moved critics and audiences like no other film of this generation, Field of Dreams is a glowing tribute to all who dare to dream.

Movies.title: Skylines
Movies.overview: When a virus threatens to turn the now earth-dwelling friendly alien hybrids against humans, Captain Rose Corley must lead a team of elite mercenaries on a mission to the alien world in order to save what's left of humanity.

Movies.title: The Berlin File
Movies.overview: Jong-seong, a North Korean ghost agent, interrupts an illegal arms sale in Berlin. A notorious North Korean agent tests the loyalties of everyone involved as Jong-Seong prepares to make the ultimate sacrifice.

Movies.title: Brighton Rock
Movies.overview: A desperate youth who is hell bent on clawing his way up through the ranks of organized crime.

Movies.title: Son of a Gun
Movies.overview: A teenager is locked up and forced to adapt to harsh prison life. One of Australia's most notorious criminals offers him protection, but at a price.

Movies.title: Saw
Movies.overview: With a dead body lying between them, two men wake up in the secure lair of a serial killer who's been nicknamed "Jigsaw". The men must follow various rules and objectives if they wish to survive and win the deadly game set for them.

Movies.title: Sicario
Movies.overview: In Mexico, SICARIO means hitman. In the lawless border area stretching between the U.S. and Mexico, an idealistic FBI agent is enlisted by an elite government task force official to aid in the escalating war against drugs.

Movies.title: Arahan
Movies.overview: A hot-blooded young cop and the Seven Masters of unmatched inner strength meet up in this urban martial arts extravaganza!

Movies.title: Casino
Movies.overview: A bookie (Robert De Niro) and his pal (Joe Pesci) make a Las Vegas casino an empire.

Movies.title: LEGO Marvel Avengers: Code Red
Movies.overview: When both heroes and villains start to mysteriously disappear, the Avengers unite to find them.

Movies.title: Furry Friends Forever: Elmo Gets a Puppy
Movies.overview: Elmo and Grover find a stray puppy whom they name Tango and work with the pet adoption fair in the hopes of finding her a "forever home."

Movies.title: Saw IV
Movies.overview: During the autopsy of serial killer Jigsaw, a cassette tape is discovered in his stomach in which he warns that his gory games will continue.

Movies.title: Zombieland
Movies.overview: Amid a zombie apocalypse, a cautious loner joins a Twinkie-obsessed daredevil and a cunning pair of sisters on a road trip from Texas to Los Angeles.

Movies.title: The Dads
Movies.overview: On a fishing trip with Matthew Shepard's father, five disparate dads discuss their love, hopes and fears for their trans kids in this short documentary.

Movies.title: The Story of Us
Movies.overview: After fifteen years of marriage, Ben and Katie Jordan's marriage has lost its spark, with the couple putting on a brave face for the benefit of their children, twelve-year-old Josh and ten-year-old Erin. While the kids are away at summer camp, Ben and Katie decide to try a trial separation: Ben moves out, and both are given a chance to reflect on where their marriage has gone wrong. However, at...

Movies.title: WWE Survivor Series: WarGames 2022
Movies.overview: Superstars square off in championship clashes, dream showdowns and the iconic WarGames Match at WWE's Fall Classic.

Movies.title: Saw 3D
Movies.overview: Horrifying cruelty is the calling card of the Jigsaw killer, whose twisted spirit and terrifying human traps are recalled in flashbacks.

Movies.title: Dany de Boon des Hauts-de-France
Movies.overview: In an eclectic one-man show, French superstar Dany Boon reflects on his homeland, his first comedy gig and the challenges of parenting hostile teens.

Movies.title: Saw VI
Movies.overview: Special Agent Strahm is dead, and Detective Hoffman has emerged as the unchallenged successor to Jigsaw's legacy. However, when the FBI draws closer to Hoffman, he is forced to set a game into motion, and Jigsaw's grand scheme is finally revealed.

Movies.title: Saw III
Movies.overview: Jigsaw kidnaps a doctor to keep him alive while he watches his new apprentice put an unlucky citizen through a brutal test.

Movies.title: Misery
Movies.overview: After his car crashes in the mountains during a snowstorm, a famous novelist is held in captivity by the dangerously unbalanced fan who “rescued” him.

Movies.title: Funky
Movies.overview: In this lively Telugu musical comedy, a struggling director spares no effort to finance his debut film — by romancing the producer's daughter.

Movies.title: Revenge of the Green Dragons
Movies.overview: A Chinese immigrant and his best friend rise through the ranks of one of New York's most powerful street gangs in the 1980s.

Movies.title: McQueen
Movies.overview: A personal look at the extraordinary life, career and artistry of Alexander McQueen. Through exclusive interviews with his closest friends and family, recovered archives, exquisite visuals and music, "McQueen" is an authentic celebration and thrilling portrait of an inspired yet tortured fashion visionary.

Movies.title: The Battleship Island
Movies.overview: During the Japanese colonial era, a Korean band leader and his daughter are coerced into being forced laborers on Hashima Island. Based on true events.

Movies.title: Jigsaw
Movies.overview: A mysterious madman rounds up a group of victims to play sadistic games of life and death. Police soon find evidence that link the crimes to an infamous killer who died 10 years earlier.

Movies.title: The Wrecking Crew
Movies.overview: A look at the dedicated musicians who backed up American legends such as The Beach Boys, Frank Sinatra, Sonny & Cher, Elvis, and many more.

Movies.title: Street Flow 3
Movies.overview: Grieving and facing the consequences of their crimes, the Traoré brothers get one last chance to forge a new path in the final chapter of this trilogy.

Movies.title: Desperado
Movies.overview: Mariachi (Antonio Banderas) plunges headfirst into the dark border underworld when he follows a trail of blood to the last of the infamous Mexican drug lords, Bucho (Joaquim de Almeida), for an action-packed, bullet-riddled showdown. With the help of his best friend (Steve Buscemi) and a beautiful bookstore owner (Salma Hayek), the Mariachi tracks Bucho, takes on his army of desperados, and lea...

Movies.title: Veteran
Movies.overview: An honest cop seeks justice for an ordinary man against all odds, while a wealthy boy seeks revenge on the cop who won't let him buy his way out.

Movies.title: Pennum Porattum
Movies.overview: A tightly wound village vilifies a young woman for a wild rumor and a dog for his own mistreatment, sparking a darkly comic spiral of mob justice.

Movies.title: The House with a Clock in Its Walls
Movies.overview: In the tradition of Amblin classics where fantastical events occur in the most unexpected places, Jack Black and two-time Academy Award® winner* Cate Blanchett star in The House with a Clock in Its Walls. The magical adventure tells the spine-tingling tale of 10-year-old Lewis (Owen Vaccaro), who goes to live with his uncle in a creaky old house with a mysterious tick-tocking heart.

Movies.title: Saw II
Movies.overview: When Jigsaw locks a few unlucky people in a booby-trapped shelter, they must find a way out before they inhale too much of a lethal nerve gas and die. But they also have to watch out for the traps Jigsaw has set.

Movies.title: Gridiron Gang
Movies.overview: Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson (The Rundown, Walking Tall) stars in this gritty and inspirational movie, based on a true story about a group of teenage delinquents given a second chance to redeem themselves by playing football.

Movies.title: Anemone
Movies.overview: Anemone explores the complex and profound ties that exist between brothers, fathers, and sons.

Movies.title: The Unjust
Movies.overview: South Koreans are terrified by a series of murders targeting children. The police fail repeatedly to capture the killer. Feeling pressure from all sides, the police pursue a possible suspect, but the suspect is shot to death by the cops. To avoid another dead end and any further heat, the National Police Agency wants to target another person, any plausible person, and close the case as soon as possible.

Movies.title: Saw V
Movies.overview: In the fifth installment of the Saw franchise, Hoffman is seemingly the last person alive to carry on the Jigsaw legacy. But when his secret is threatened, Hoffman must go on the hunt to eliminate all loose ends.

Movies.title: Montana Story
Movies.overview: Two estranged siblings (Haley Lu Richardson, Owen Teague) return home to the sprawling ranch they once knew and loved, confronting a deep and bitter family legacy against a mythic American backdrop. From the acclaimed Writer/Directors Scott McGehee and David Siegel (What Maisie Knew, The Deep End) comes a neo-Western with an emotional tremor hiding beneath it.

Movies.title: Caterpillar
Movies.overview: Endlessly struggling to feel seen, David becomes infatuated with a mysterious company's promise to transform people's lives by permanently changing the color of their eyes. New York Times Critic's Pick 2025.

Movies.title: Night Catches Us
Movies.overview: A man reappears in a neighborhood he grew up in during the Black Power movement, which raises suspicions and threatens his passion for an old friend.

Movies.title: Alive and Kicking
Movies.overview: Meet lively swing dance professionals and enthusiasts, who are passionate about expressing themselves and spreading joy through movement.

Movies.title: Amit Tandon: Family Tandoncies
Movies.overview: From the death of romance in marriage to the injustices of modern-day parenting, Amit Tandon shares wisdom and wisecracks as a battle-scarred family guy.

Movies.title: Anaconda
Movies.overview: Lifelong friends Doug (Jack Black) and Griff (Paul Rudd) finally leap into their long-held dream of remaking their favorite cult classic, Anaconda, in the depths of the Amazon. But things get real when an actual giant anaconda appears, turning their comically chaotic movie set into a deadly situation. The movie they're dying to make? It might just get them killed......

Movies.title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
Movies.overview: Teenage Gru joins forces with Kevin, Stuart and Bob to defeat the Vicious 6 in an adventure featuring spectacular action and the franchise's signature subversive humor.

Movies.title: Anatomy of a Fall
Movies.overview: When Samuel is found dead, the police question if he was murdered or if he committed suicide and his wife Sandra becomes the main suspect. The investigation leads to an unsettling journey into the depths of their conflicted relationship.

Movies.title: The Bad Guys 2
Movies.overview: In this new action-packed chapter, the now-reformed Bad Guys are forced to pull one last heist, masterminded by a new team of criminals: The Bad Girls.

Movies.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
Movies.overview: The war is over, but revenge is not. In this sequel, Aatami seeks to rebuild his life, but the Red Army turns his journey into a bloody hunt by releasing the man who massacred his family.

Movies.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
Movies.overview: A criminal mastermind unleashes a twisted form of justice in this terrifying new chapter from the book of SAW, starring Chris Rock, Max Minghella, and Samuel L. Jackson.

Movies.title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
The Creator
Movies.overview: As a future war between the human race and artificial intelligence rages on, ex-special forces agent Joshua is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI. The Creator has developed a mysterious weapon that has the power to end the war and all of mankind. As Joshua and his team of elite operatives venture into enemy-occupied territory, they soon discover the w

Movies.title: In a Relationship
Movies.overview: Over the course of a summer in LA, steadfast couple Owen and Hallie stare down the end of their relationship while Matt and Willa are just beginning.
